calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Terminating Snactiopn And Strike Claim
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Order Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant Nakia Lemon's claim is ordered stricken. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Petitioner's Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
